creator: uqs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Triggered by a mail from jhell, I looked for ports with missing ident strings
in their Makefiles. Seems like all have been fixed, but the keyword expansion
is disabled for some ports for no apparent reason.

Fix: cvs admin -kko the files listed below
How-To-Repeat: cvs st devel/nemiver/Makefile
see options
